productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Federer Black Formal Shoes
description: Stylish to a T, these dress shoes from red tape are perfect for all formal occasions. Slip into these great oxfords to look like you mean business. The pointed toe silhouette adds to the charm of these shoes, coupled with the perforated pattern. A great addition to any sophisticated man's wardrobe, it can add tons of character to your outfit. Upper Full-grain textured leather upper for added durability and style Pointed toe design for a more stylish look Perforated pattern for added style Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized fit CT padded tongue to protect from excessive rubbing and prevent blisters Leather wrap-around overlay along the heel and midfoot for better support Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and support Leather inner to absorb moisture and keep feet dry Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Diamond shaped grooves on the forefoot and horizontal grooves on the heel for better traction
